translations.Repository Treemap Tooltip Body: The repository treemap shows each file and folder as a rectangle whose area is proportional to its relative size in the repository (typically by lines of code or file size). Larger areas indicate files or folders that take up more of the repository. Double-click a folder to drill down into its internal structure; single-click to select it and view the commit and author statistics on the right. Colors distinguish folders, and a darker border marks the currently selected item.
translations.Enable Undo/Redo (experimental, may impa: Enable Undo/Redo (experimental, may impact performance on large repos)
translations.Double-click an entry to jump to that st: Double-click an entry to jump to that state.
translations.Jump to HEAD to {0} ({1})?\n\nThis will:
Jump to HEAD to {0} ({1})?

This will reset your current branch and working tree to that state. You can undo this afterwards.
translations.AI returned an invalid plan. Please retr: AI returned an invalid plan. Please retry, or compose commits manually.
translations.Group {0} has an empty subject. Please f: Group {0} has an empty subject. Please fill in a commit subject or skip the group.
translations.No staged files to compose. Stage some f: No staged files to compose. Stage some files first.
